song.title: Once Again
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Jesus Christ, I think upon Your sacrifice: You became nothing, Poured out to death; Many times I've wondered at Your gift of love, And I'm in that place once again, I'm in that place once again
[C] Chorus Once again I look upon The cross where You died; I'm humbled by Your mercy And I'm broken inside; Once again, I thank You, Once again, I give you my life
[V2] 2) Now You are Exalted to the highest place, Soon everyone will Bow and confess; But for now, I marvel at Your saving grace And I'm full of praise once again, I'm full of praise once again
[B] Thank you for the cross Thank you for the cross Thank you for the cross Thank you for the cross, my Friend
[E] 1) Jesus Christ, I think upon Your sacrifice: You gave Yourself up, Poured out to death; Many times I've wondered at Your gift of love, And I'm in that place once again, I'm in that place once again
Chorus Once again I look upon The cross where You died; I'm humbled by Your mercy And I'm broken inside; Once again, I thank You, Once again, I give you my life
2) Now You are Exalted to the highest place, Soon everyone will Bow and confess; But for now, I marvel at Your saving grace And I'm full of praise once again, I'm full of praise once again
